channel.title: Projects on Rodders
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Rodders

item.title: Salifort Motors Project
item.description: Google Advanced Data Analytics Capstone Project - Salifort Motors Overview Salifort Motors (The Client) is a fictitious company experiencing significant loss of employees. They have created a project team to provide data driven suggestions for the HR team to implement to improve employee retention. The estimated cost of lost employees to the client is in the order of $42m for 2022, for 1,991 employees who left employment in 2022, representing 20% of all employees (10,000).
